name: Energy Recharge
desc: Energy Recharge (ER%) is a percentage statistic that determines how much Energy a character regains by receiving the same amount of particles.

list.imgDesc: Every character has 100% as their base Energy Recharge percentage.
list.key: Energy Recharge on the character stats screen

list.imgDesc: The special ascension stat of some characters is Energy Recharge, increasing it with the higher ascensions.
list.key: Energy Recharge as special ascension stat

list.imgDesc: Energy Recharge has a direct connection with the particles and orbs.

content.text: The mechanics of Energy Recharge are closely connected to the Energy produced by Particles and Orbs.

The particles generate a baseline of 1 point of Elemental Energy; Orbs a baseline of 3. Particles can be of one of the 7 elements or can be of clear color. Within the first category, an elemental particle can be of the same element as a character, or of a different one. Also, the character can be on-field or off-field when the particles are caught. These different combinations result in varying energy gained based on the situation, represented in the table below.

As an example: If the element of the particle/orb and character are identical, the amount of energy gained will be 300% of its base; for a clear one, 200%; and if their elements differ, 100%. If the character is on-field, they receive the full 100%; if not, just 60% (or 70% or 80% if there are only 3 or 2 members in the party respectively).

In this way, if a clear particle regenerates 2pts of Elemental Energy to the on-field character, with 200% Energy Recharge it will regenerate 4 pts (2 x 100% x 200%); and with 150%, 3 pts (2 x 100% x 150%).

Not all the Energy regeneration is affected by the Energy Recharge stat, but only the Energy produced by Elemental Skills and Enemy drops. This excludes other mechanisms like the energy generated by the Normal Attacks and by the called "direct" Energy generation (such as the provided by some artifacts' sets, weapons, talents, constellations, etc.).

Xingqiu generates 5 Hydro particles with his Elemental Skill. As he is of the same element (x3) and he collects them on-field (x1), he would obtain 15pts of Energy. However, if his Energy Recharge is 200%, he gains 30 points of Energy. And if it's 265%, 40pts. In this way, with just two uses of his Elemental Skill, he will recover all his Elemental Energy to activate the Elemental Burst again (discarding the calculation of the other particles he may obtain).

All characters have a base 100% Energy Recharge. This base percentage can normally be increased by the Sands artifact piece whose Main Stat can be Energy Recharge (+51.8%), by the artifacts' substats, by the effects of a set of artifacts, by the substat of a weapon or its passive, and some characters, by their special ascension stat, by a talent or by a constellation.
